tournament.name: Championnat Regional : Nord Pas De Calais

decks.notes: The main theme of this deck is focused on aggressive gameplay using Spider-Man 2099 as the commander. It combines a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. The deck includes a variety of counter spells, removal spells, and card draw to maintain tempo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, the mana base is well constructed to ensure consistency in casting spells and activating abilities. Overall, the goal is to quickly build a board presence, maintain control of the game, and ultimately overwhelm the opponent with a combination of combat damage and direct damage spells.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping into powerful creatures and utilizing land-based interactions to overwhelm the opponent. Lumra, Bellow of the Woods is the commander, providing additional mana and card advantage. The deck includes a variety of land ramp creatures and enchantments like Lotus Cobra, Tireless Provisioner, and Utopia Sprawl to accelerate mana production. The deck also includes utility lands like Maze of Ith and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With efficient ramp and powerful creatures like Primeval Titan and Emrakul, the Promised End, the deck aims to establish a dominant board presence early in the game and pressure the opponent with aggressive plays.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to control the battlefield and quickly overwhelm the opponent. With Aragorn, King of Gondor as the commander, the deck includes a mix of powerful creatures like True-Name Nemesis and Hullbreacher, alongside versatile spells like Counterspell and Lightning Bolt. The goal is to maintain a steady stream of threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and removal. By applying early pressure and maintaining control of the board, the deck aims to close out the game swiftly before the opponent can stabilize. Additionally, the deck includes various lands to ensure consistent mana production and fixing.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with Quintorius, History Chaser as the commander. The deck includes a mix of strong creatures and powerful spells to quickly take control of the game and put pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes various tools to disrupt the opponent's strategy, such as Drannith Magistrate and Tithe+Taker','','');">Tithe Taker. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Lightning Bolt for targeted removal, as well as enchantments like Parallax Wave and Static Prison for control and protection. The mana base is designed to support a fast-paced game plan, with a mix of plains, mountains, and dual lands to ensure consistency and efficiency in casting spells.

The main idea of this deck is to use a combination of powerful creatures such as Archon of Cruelty and Grief, along with spells like Demonic Tutor and Tendrils of Agony, to quickly overwhelm and outpace the opponent. By utilizing various reanimation spells like Animate Dead and Necromancy, the deck aims to continuously bring back its creatures from the graveyard to maintain pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force Spike to control the opponent's game plan and protect its own strategy. The mana base is designed to provide the necessary colors for casting spells efficiently and consistently, allowing for a strong and aggressive gameplay.

The deck revolves around using Tifa Lockhart as the commander to lead an aggressive strategy focused on maximizing creature efficiency and combat prowess. The deck includes a variety of mana dorks and efficient creatures such as Allosaurus Shepherd, Boreal Druid, and Fyndhorn Elves to quickly ramp up mana production and flood the board with threats. Various pump spells like Berserk, Invigorate, and Might of Old Krosa are used to enhance the power of creatures and close out games quickly. The land base is optimized for mana acceleration and fixing, allowing for consistent and explosive plays. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and relentless assault backed by strong combat tricks and synergies.

The deck focuses on a wide range of aggressive creatures and powerful spells to control the game and dominate the opponent in a fast-paced 1 vs 1 format. With Aragorn, King of Gondor leading the charge, the deck includes a mix of aggressive creatures like Broadside Bombardiers and True-Name Nemesis alongside disruptive spells like Counterspell and Swords to Plowshares to maintain control of the battlefield. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and key lands like Command Tower and Volcanic Island ensure that the deck has the resources it needs to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The deck revolves around using Quintorius, History Chaser as the commander to lead an aggressive strategy. The deck includes a mix of creatures and spells that help to control the battlefield and disrupt opponent's strategies, while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The deck also includes a variety of removal spells to deal with threats and keep the opponent on the back foot. Additionally, there are cards that provide card advantage and mana acceleration to ensure the deck can keep up with the opponent's resources. Overall, the key concept of the deck is to be proactive and aggressive, using Quintorius's ability to make the most of every creature that hits the graveyard.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creature plays and powerful reanimation spells, all supported by efficient removal and disruption. By combining fast, evasive threats like Boggart Trawler and Chaos Defiler with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while also generating card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Demonic Tutor and Unearth ensures that the deck has access to its key threats and answers when needed. Utilizing a mix of red and black mana sources, the deck can quickly deploy its threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately securing victory through a combination of aggression and resource denial.

This deck revolves around reanimation and graveyard manipulation to cheat out powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty, Griselbrand, and Valgavoth, Terror Eater. It aims to disrupt opponents with counterspells and hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek while generating value through cards like Daze and Remand. The main game plan is to fill up the graveyard with cards like Buried Alive and Careful Study, then reanimate creatures with spells like Animate Dead and Necromancy. The mana base is optimized to support the color requirements of the deck and includes utility lands like Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth and Underground Sea. Overall, the deck combines aggression with resource management to overwhelm opponents in 1 vs 1 matches.

The key strategy of this deck is to utilize Cloud, Midgar Mercenary as the commander to establish a strong aggro presence in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format. The deck focuses on quickly deploying efficient creatures like Mother of Runes and Skyclave Apparition to apply pressure on the opponent. It also includes powerful equipment such as Sword of Feast and Famine and Umezawa's Jitte to enhance the combat capabilities of the creatures. The deck is designed to disrupt opponents with cards like Drannith Magistrate and Palace Jailer, while also providing protection and card advantage through cards like Giver of Runes and Enlightened Tutor. The mana base includes a mix of Plains and utility lands to ensure consistent mana production.

The deck focuses on utilizing the tokens generated by Slimefoot and the recurring abilities of Squee to maintain a constant stream of threats and pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, using cards like Goblin Bombardment and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker to keep the pressure on. The deck also includes a toolbox of creatures and removal spells to deal with various threats from the opponent, maximizing the efficiency of its cards. The mana base is optimized to ensure consistent access to the deck's powerful spells and abilities, allowing for a high level of consistency in executing its game plan.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to cast powerful creatures and spells, overwhelming opponents with a high number of threats. It includes cards that accelerate land drops and fetch lands from the library, as well as cards that generate additional mana or put multiple lands onto the battlefield at once. The ability to quickly build up resources allows for the deployment of big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Primeval Titan, enabling aggressive plays and a strong board presence. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Veil of Summer and Eldrazi Confluence to protect its game plan and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck is built around the aggressive strategy of Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers, utilizing a mix of powerful creatures and efficient mana ramp to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck includes big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Worldspine Wurm, supported by cards like Crop Rotation and Search for Tomorrow to quickly get them onto the battlefield. The deck also includes a range of red burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning to handle opposing threats, as well as disruption like Veil of Summer and City of Solitude to protect your own game plan. Overall, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence and close out games quickly with a combination of big creatures and direct damage spells.

The deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures and powerful instant-speed removal spells to apply pressure on the opponent early in the game. The inclusion of partner commanders allows for flexibility and increased consistency in drawing key cards. The deck also utilizes equipment cards to enhance the combat abilities of its creatures, making them even more threatening in battle. Additionally, the mana base is carefully constructed to ensure that the deck can cast its spells efficiently and consistently throughout the game. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and resilient aggro strategy, using a mix of creatures, removal spells, and equipment to secure victory in one-on-one duels.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and efficient spells to control the board and apply pressure on the opponent. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and combat tricks, the goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while quickly reducing their life total. The Partner commanders allow for versatile strategies and increased card advantage, while the diverse creature selection provides different angles of attack. The mana base is optimized for consistent casting of spells and accessing a variety of colors. Overall, the deck aims to outpace the opponent with a proactive game plan and adapt to different matchups through its flexibility and synergy between the deck components.

The deck focuses on utilizing Terra, Magical Adept as the commander to rapidly deploy aggressive creatures and disrupt opponents with a mix of powerful spells. The deck includes a variety of high-impact creatures such as Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, supported by cards like Birds of Paradise and Noble Hierarch to ramp up resources quickly. In addition, the deck features a selection of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Fatal Push to control the board. With a strong mana base featuring dual lands and fetchlands, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and efficient aggro strategy while also having the flexibility to disrupt their game plan with disruption spells when needed.

The key focus of this deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt your opponent's game plan while building up your own resources through card advantage and removal spells. Ketramose, the New Dawn serves as a powerful commander that can enable both aggro and control strategies, providing a versatile and adaptable game plan. The deck includes a wide range of removal spells, hand disruption, and powerful creatures to pressure your opponent and maintain control of the battlefield. With a strong mana base and access to powerful cards like Demonic Tutor and Armageddon, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver your opponent to secure victory in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format.

The deck is focused on using Brigid, Clachan's Heart as a commander to lead an aggressive strategy. The deck includes a mix of small creatures like Birds of Paradise and Elvish Mystic to accelerate mana production and larger threats like Stoneforge Mystic and Walking Ballista to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes various utility creatures like Ranger of Eos and Palace Jailer to provide card advantage and disruption. Additionally, the deck features powerful enchantments like Parallax Wave and Earthcraft to control the board and generate additional value. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to establish early board presence, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and close out the game with efficient threats.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay, using a variety of powerful creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The commander, Deadpool, Trading Card, enhances the aggro strategy by providing additional support and utility. The deck includes a mix of creatures with strong abilities and efficient removal spells to control the board and keep the pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the mana base is optimized for consistent and fast mana production to support the aggressive game plan. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with early threats, provide disruption with removal spells, and maintain pressure throughout the game to secure a victory.

The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. It utilizes a combination of powerful creatures like Barrowgoyf, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Kroxa, Titan of Death's Hunger, along with disruptive creatures like Dauthi Voidwalker and Grief to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a wide range of removal spells such as Lightning Bolt, Fatal Push, and Terminate to deal with opposing threats. Additionally, the deck features versatile cards like Demonic Tutor and Tainted Pact to search for key pieces and ensure consistency. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the aggressive strategy and provide flexibility in casting spells.

This aggressive deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with mana dorks and enchantments like Utopia Sprawl and Wild Growth to power out big creatures like Mossborn Hydra. The deck also includes a variety of pump spells like Might of Old Krosa and Scale Up to make your creatures even bigger and harder to deal with. Tifa Lockhart's ability allows you to untap creatures and lands, giving you the ability to attack and defend at the same time. With a mix of creatures, pump spells, and mana acceleration, this deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with large, powerful threats while also maintaining a solid defense with cards like Sylvan Safekeeper and Vines of Vastwood.

This deck focuses on utilizing control elements to manipulate the game and disrupt the opponent's strategies. With a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw, the goal is to maintain control of the board and prevent the opponent from developing a strong board presence. The commander, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, provides additional value by proliferating counters and enhancing the deck's synergies. The deck includes versatile cards like Snapcaster Mage and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, along with powerful removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Toxic Deluge. By effectively managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to outplay and outlast the opponent in a 1 vs 1 duel.

The deck is focused on utilizing the aggressive playstyle of Spider-Man 2099 to control the game and overwhelm the opponent. It includes a variety of powerful creatures and spells that can disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining a strong tempo. The deck also incorporates a mix of counter spells and removal to control the board and protect its own threats. The mana base is built to ensure smooth color access and support the deck's aggressive nature, allowing it to consistently apply pressure and outmaneuver the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and maintain control to secure a victory in 1 vs 1 Duel Commander matches.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. Spider-Man 2099 acts as the commander, providing a powerful and versatile threat on the battlefield. The deck includes a mix of control elements like counterspells and removal spells to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck features a strong mana base with a variety of lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana. Overall, the key concept of the deck is to apply pressure early and maintain control of the game through a combination of aggressive threats and disruptive spells.

The deck revolves around utilizing aggressive creatures and powerful spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victories. Aragorn, King of Gondor, serves as the commander, providing leadership and support for the aggressive strategy. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures like True-Name Nemesis and Faerie Mastermind, along with a variety of disruptive spells such as Counterspell and Swords to Plowshares to control the game. The mana base is well-constructed to ensure smooth gameplay and the inclusion of cards like Teferi, Time Raveler adds additional versatility and protection. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent and maintain control of the battlefield to achieve victory.

This deck is focused on aggressive gameplay with a variety of creatures and spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain board control. The commander, Aragorn, King of Gondor, leads the charge with a mix of versatile creatures like Mother of Runes and Malcolm, Alluring Scoundrel, as well as powerful spells like Counterspell and Lightning Bolt for removal and protection. The deck also includes a strong suite of counterspells and disruptive cards such as Drannith Magistrate and Hullbreacher to prevent the opponent from getting ahead. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive spells, this deck aims to pressure the opponent early and consistently while controlling the game state to secure victory.

The deck revolves around utilizing Emmara, Soul of the Accord as the commander to create a wide board presence with small creatures and then using various support cards to disrupt opponents and protect your own board. The main focus is on aggressive plays and overwhelming opponents with multiple threats, while also controlling the game through cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Winter Orb. The deck includes a mix of creature-based aggression, disruption, and protection spells to keep the pressure on opponents and maintain control of the battlefield. It aims to take advantage of Emmara's ability to create tokens and build a strong board presence that can quickly overwhelm opponents.

The deck focuses on utilizing Quintorius, History Chaser as the commander to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy. By including a mix of low-cost creatures, removal spells, and mana acceleration, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with quick and powerful plays. The inclusion of cards like Lightning Bolt, Swords to Plowshares, and Wrath of God helps maintain board control and deal with threats efficiently. Additionally, the mana base is built to support the deck's aggressive game plan with a mix of snow-covered lands, fetch lands, and dual lands. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to establish early board presence, maintain tempo, and pressure the opponent to secure victory in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format.

The focus of this deck is to utilize Quintorius, History Chaser as the commander to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy. The deck includes a variety of creatures, spells, and enchantments that support an aggro playstyle, putting pressure on the opponent early in the game. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, Solitude, and Seasoned Pyromancer provide creature support, while spells like Lightning Bolt, Swords to Plowshares, and Pyroblast offer removal and disruption options. The mana base is designed to support a mix of white and red spells, with a focus on snow-covered lands for additional synergy. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a quick and efficient offense while maintaining control of the game tempo.

This deck focuses on utilizing Aang, Swift Savior as the commander to lead an aggro strategy. The deck includes a variety of creatures with abilities that can disrupt opponents or generate value, such as Meddling Mage and Skyclave Apparition. There are also spells like Swords to Plowshares and Remand to control the board and protect your creatures. The mana base is designed to provide consistent access to the deck's colors and ensure efficient casting of spells. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to put pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures while using disruption and control elements to maintain an advantage and secure victory in a fast-paced, 1 vs 1 Duel Commander game.

This deck focuses on aggressive and fast-paced gameplay, utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. With Zurgo Bellstriker as the commander, the strategy is to constantly apply pressure through consistent early aggression and direct damage spells. The deck includes a variety of efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Grim Lavamancer, along with powerful burn spells such as Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless onslaught of creatures and burn spells, creating a sense of urgency and forcing them to react quickly to survive. The emphasis is on proactive plays and maintaining a high level of aggression throughout the game.
